<content>250:     if (response.status === 429) {
251:       throw new ProviderError('provider_rate_limited', 'Cloudflare API rate limit exceeded');
252:     }
253:     if (!response.ok) {
254:       const errorMessage =
255:         cloudflareErrorsMessage(parsed.errors) ??
256:         (typeof parsed.errors === 'object' && parsed.errors !== null
257:           ? JSON.stringify(parsed.errors)
258:           : text || `Cloudflare API request failed with status ${response.status}`);
259:       throw new ProviderError('provider_deploy_failed', errorMessage);
260:     }
261: 
262:     if (parsed.success === false) {
263:       const errorMessage =
264:         cloudflareErrorsMessage(parsed.errors) ??
265:         `Cloudflare API reported success=false${response.status ? ` (status ${response.status})` : ''}`;
266:       throw new ProviderError('provider_deploy_failed', errorMessage);
267:     }
268: 
269:     return parsed;
270:   }
271: 
272:   private previewUrlForDeployment(deploymentId: string): string {
273:     return `https://dep-${dnsSafeLabel(deploymentId)}.${this.previewDomain}`;
274:   }
275: 
276:   private static readonly assetsMainModule = 'nimbus-assets-entry.mjs';
277:   private static readonly scriptUpdateDeploymentPrefix = 'script-update:';
278: 
279:   private static assetsWorkerSource(): string {
280:     return 'export default { async fetch(request, env) { return env.ASSETS.fetch(request); } };';
281:   }
282: 
283:   private static scriptUpdateProviderDeploymentId(deploymentId: string): string {
284:     return `${CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.scriptUpdateDeploymentPrefix}${deploymentId}`;
285:   }
286: 
287:   private static deploymentIdFromScriptUpdateProviderId(providerDeploymentId: string): string | null {
288:     if (!providerDeploymentId.startsWith(CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.scriptUpdateDeploymentPrefix)) {
289:       return null;
290:     }
291:     const value = providerDeploymentId.slice(CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.scriptUpdateDeploymentPrefix.length).trim();
292:     return value ? value : null;
293:   }
294: 
295:   private async probePreviewUrl(url: string): Promise<'reachable' | 'missing' | 'unknown'> {
296:     const controller = new AbortController();
297:     const timeout = setTimeout(() => controller.abort('preview_url_probe_timeout'), 2_000);
298:     try {
299:       const response = await providerFetch(url, {
300:         method: 'GET',
301:         redirect: 'manual',
302:         signal: controller.signal,
303:       });
304:       if (response.status >= 200 && response.status < 400) {
305:         return 'reachable';
306:       }
307:       if (response.status === 404) {
308:         return 'missing';
309:       }
310:       return 'unknown';
311:     } catch {
312:       return 'unknown';
313:     } finally {
314:       clearTimeout(timeout);
315:     }
316:   }
317: 
318:   private static toManifestHash(sha256: string): string {
319:     const normalized = sha256.trim().toLowerCase();
320:     const hex = normalized.replace(/[^a-f0-9]/g, '');
321:     return (hex.slice(0, 32) || '0'.repeat(32)).padEnd(32, '0');
322:   }
323: 
324:   private static completionJwtFromUploadResponse(parsed: Record<string, unknown>): string | null {
325:     const topLevel = typeof parsed.jwt === 'string' && parsed.jwt.trim() ? parsed.jwt.trim() : null;
326:     if (topLevel) {
327:       return topLevel;
328:     }
329:     if (typeof parsed.result === 'object' && parsed.result !== null) {
330:       const resultJwt = (parsed.result as Record<string, unknown>).jwt;
331:       if (typeof resultJwt === 'string' && resultJwt.trim()) {
332:         return resultJwt.trim();
333:       }
334:     }
335:     return null;
336:   }
337: 
338:   private async deployScriptWithAssetsJwt(completionJwt: string): Promise<Record<string, unknown>> {
339:     const metadata = {
340:       main_module: CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.assetsMainModule,
341:       compatibility_date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10),
342:       assets: {
343:         jwt: completionJwt,
344:       },
345:       bindings: [
346:         {
347:           name: 'ASSETS',
348:           type: 'assets',
349:         },
350:       ],
351:     };
352:     const form = new FormData();
353:     form.append('metadata', JSON.stringify(metadata));
354:     form.append(
355:       CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.assetsMainModule,
356:       new Blob([CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.assetsWorkerSource()], {
357:         type: 'application/javascript+module',
358:       }),
359:       CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.assetsMainModule
360:     );
361: 
362:     const response = await this.request(`/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}`, {
363:       method: 'PUT',
364:       body: form,
365:     });
366:     return this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
367:   }
368: 
369:   async precheck(): Promise<WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck[]> {
370:     const checks: WorkspaceDeployProviderPrecheck[] = [];
371:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_real_enabled', ok: true });
372:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_credentials_present', ok: true });
373: 
374:     const response = await this.request(`/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}`);
375:     await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
376:     checks.push({ code: 'provider_project_access', ok: true });
377:     return checks;
378:   }
379: 
380:   async createDeployment(input: WorkspaceDeployCreateInput): Promise<WorkspaceDeployCreateResult> {
381:     if (!isValidRelativeOutputDir(input.outputDir)) {
382:       throw new ProviderError(
383:         'provider_invalid_output_dir',
384:         'deploy.outputDir must be a safe non-root relative directory path'
385:       );
386:     }
387: 
388:     const assetPath = `/__nimbus/${dnsSafeLabel(input.deploymentId)}.tar.gz`;
389:     const manifestHash = CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.toManifestHash(input.outputBundle.sha256);
390:     const sessionResponse = await this.request(
391:       `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/assets-upload-session`,
392:       {
393:         method: 'POST',
394:         body: JSON.stringify({
395:           manifest: {
396:             [assetPath]: {
397:               hash: manifestHash,
398:               size: input.outputBundle.bytes.byteLength,
399:             },
400:           },
401:         }),
402:       }
403:     );
404:     const sessionParsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(sessionResponse);
405:     const sessionResult =
406:       typeof sessionParsed.result === 'object' && sessionParsed.result !== null
407:         ? (sessionParsed.result as Record<string, unknown>)
408:         : {};
409:     const uploadJwt =
410:       typeof sessionResult.jwt === 'string' && sessionResult.jwt.trim() ? sessionResult.jwt.trim() : null;
411:     if (!uploadJwt) {
412:       throw new ProviderError('provider_deploy_failed', 'Cloudflare asset upload session did not return a JWT');
413:     }
414: 
415:     const bucketSets = Array.isArray(sessionResult.buckets) ? sessionResult.buckets : [];
416:     const shouldUpload = bucketSets.some((bucket) => Array.isArray(bucket) && bucket.some((value) => value === manifestHash));
417: 
418:     let uploadParsed: Record<string, unknown> | null = null;
419:     if (shouldUpload) {
420:       const uploadForm = new FormData();
421:       uploadForm.append(manifestHash, toBase64(input.outputBundle.bytes));
422:       const uploadResponse = await this.request(
423:         `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/assets/upload?base64=true`,
424:         {
425:           method: 'POST',
426:           body: uploadForm,
427:         },
428:         uploadJwt
429:       );
430:       uploadParsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(uploadResponse);
431:     }
432: 
433:     const completionJwt =
434:       (uploadParsed ? CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.completionJwtFromUploadResponse(uploadParsed) : null) ??
435:       CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.completionJwtFromUploadResponse(sessionParsed);
436:     if (!completionJwt) {
437:       throw new ProviderError('provider_deploy_failed', 'Cloudflare asset upload did not return a completion JWT');
438:     }
439: 
440:     let parsed: Record<string, unknown>;
441:     let createStatus: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus = 'running';
442:     let fallbackScriptUpdate = false;
443:     try {
444:       const response = await this.request(`/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments`, {
445:         method: 'POST',
446:         body: JSON.stringify({
447:           deployment_id: input.deploymentId,
448:           alias: `dep-${dnsSafeLabel(input.deploymentId)}`,
449:           output_dir: input.outputDir,
450:           assets: {
451:             jwt: completionJwt,
452:             manifest: {
453:               [assetPath]: {
454:                 hash: manifestHash,
455:                 size: input.outputBundle.bytes.byteLength,
456:               },
457:             },
458:           },
459:           preview_url: this.previewUrlForDeployment(input.deploymentId),
460:         }),
461:       });
462:       parsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
463:     } catch (error) {
464:       const providerError = normalizeProviderError(error);
465:       if (
466:         providerError.code === 'provider_deploy_failed' &&
467:         providerError.message.toLowerCase().includes('invalid for field "versions"')
468:       ) {
469:         parsed = await this.deployScriptWithAssetsJwt(completionJwt);
470:         fallbackScriptUpdate = true;
471:       } else {
472:         throw error;
473:       }
474:     }
475:     const result =
476:       typeof parsed.result === 'object' && parsed.result !== null ? (parsed.result as Record<string, unknown>) : {};
477:     const providerDeploymentId = fallbackScriptUpdate
478:       ? CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.scriptUpdateProviderDeploymentId(input.deploymentId)
479:       : typeof result.id === 'string' && result.id.trim()
480:         ? result.id.trim()
481:         : `cfdep_${input.deploymentId}`;
482: 
483:     return {
484:       providerDeploymentId,
485:       status: createStatus,
486:       deployedUrl: fallbackScriptUpdate ? null : this.previewUrlForDeployment(input.deploymentId),
487:     };
488:   }
489: 
490:   async getDeploymentStatus(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<WorkspaceDeployStatusResult> {
491:     const scriptUpdateDeploymentId = CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.deploymentIdFromScriptUpdateProviderId(providerDeploymentId);
492:     if (scriptUpdateDeploymentId) {
493:       const url = this.previewUrlForDeployment(scriptUpdateDeploymentId);
494:       const probe = await this.probePreviewUrl(url);
495:       if (probe === 'reachable') {
496:         return {
497:           status: 'succeeded',
498:           deployedUrl: url,
499:         };
500:       }
501:       if (probe === 'missing') {
502:         return {
503:           status: 'failed',
504:           deployedUrl: null,
505:           errorCode: 'provider_deploy_failed',
506:           errorMessage: 'Fallback script update succeeded but preview URL alias is not reachable',
507:         };
508:       }
509:       return {
510:         status: 'running',
511:         deployedUrl: null,
512:       };
513:     }
514:     if (providerDeploymentId.startsWith('script_update_')) {
515:       return {
516:         status: 'failed',
517:         deployedUrl: null,
518:         errorCode: 'provider_deploy_failed',
519:         errorMessage: 'Legacy script update provider deployment IDs are not resumable',
520:       };
521:     }
522: 
523:     const response = await this.request(
524:       `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments/${providerDeploymentId}`
525:     );
526: 
527:     if (response.status === 404) {
528:       return {
529:         status: 'running',
530:         deployedUrl: null,
531:       };
532:     }
533: 
534:     const parsed = await this.parseCloudflareResult(response);
535:     const result =
536:       typeof parsed.result === 'object' && parsed.result !== null ? (parsed.result as Record<string, unknown>) : {};
537:     const hasVersions = Array.isArray(result.versions) && result.versions.length > 0;
538:     let state: WorkspaceDeploymentStatus;
539:     if (typeof result.status === 'string') {
540:       const mapped = mapProviderState(result.status);
541:       state = mapped === 'running' && hasVersions ? 'succeeded' : mapped;
542:     } else {
543:       state = hasVersions ? 'succeeded' : 'running';
544:     }
545:     return {
546:       status: state,
547:       deployedUrl: typeof result.preview_url === 'string' && result.preview_url.trim() ? result.preview_url : null,
548:       errorCode: typeof result.error_code === 'string' ? result.error_code : undefined,
549:       errorMessage: typeof result.error_message === 'string' ? result.error_message : undefined,
550:     };
551:   }
552: 
553:   async cancelDeployment(providerDeploymentId: string): Promise<{ accepted: boolean }> {
554:     if (CloudflareWorkersAssetsProvider.deploymentIdFromScriptUpdateProviderId(providerDeploymentId)) {
555:       return { accepted: false };
556:     }
557:     if (providerDeploymentId.startsWith('script_update_')) {
558:       return { accepted: false };
559:     }
560: 
561:     const response = await this.request(
562:       `/accounts/${this.accountId}/workers/scripts/${this.projectName}/deployments/${providerDeploymentId}/cancel`,
563:       { method: 'POST', body: '{}' }
564:     );
565: 
566:     if (response.status === 404 || response.status === 409) {
567:       return { accepted: false };
568:     }
569: 

(Showing lines 250-569 of 616. Use offset=570 to continue.)
</content>

parts.text: No confirmed bugs found in the current uncommitted changes after reviewing `git diff` and inspecting the modified files in context (`packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deploy-provider.ts` and `packages/worker/src/lib/workspace-deploy-provider.test.ts`).
